---
title: "Data Science"
---

# Apa itu Data Science?

Data Science adalah ilmu yang menggabungkan statistik, programming, dan domain knowledge untuk menganalisis data.

## Pilar Data Science:

1. **Statistik** - Dasar analisis data
2. **Programming** - Python, R, SQL
3. **Domain Knowledge** - Paham konteks bisnis

## Tools Populer:

| Tool | Fungsi |
|------|--------|
| R | Analisis statistik |
| Python | Machine learning |
| SQL | Query database |
| Tableau | Visualisasi |

## Contoh Kode R:

```r
# Install package
install.packages("tidyverse")

# Load library
library(tidyverse)

# Contoh visualisasi
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Fuel Efficiency vs Weight")
```
